modtabs.midnightconfig.allowEditing.tool: When disabled, the layout editor (Shift+Z, long-press a tab, or the Edit button) is locked. Intended for modpack makers shipping a fixed tab layout.

modtabs.midnightconfig.nearbyContainersT: Show one tab per nearby chest / barrel / shulker box / modded container so you can open them without leaving your inventory.
Radius in blocks to scan around the player for openable containers. Default 5.
If on, containers blocked behind walls won't show a tab. Off by default — the vanilla reach check is enough.
modtabs.midnightconfig.customTabsEnabled: Enable loading custom tabs from JSON configuration files in config/modtabs/custom_tabs/
modtabs.midnightconfig.customTabsDebugLo: Enable detailed logging for custom tab loading and actions
